title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.309 - Limb Loss Awareness Month designated for month of April
text:
9.309.  Limb Loss Awareness Month designated for month of April. — The month of April is hereby designated as "Limb Loss Awareness Month" in Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to engage in appropriate events and activities to spread awareness about limb loss and limb difference.
(L. 2021 S.B. 72)
